name: angeo/module-aeo-audit
description: Magento 2 AEO (AI Engine Optimization) Audit. v3 covers 15 signals — robots.txt AI bots, llms.txt + llms.jsonl, Product / Organization / FAQ schema, merchant return + shipping policies, sitemap.xml, UCP profile, AI product feed, OG tags, canonical + hreflang, JSON-LD quality, well-known endpoint matrix, Core Web Vitals via CrUX. Score Trend dashboard, Admin UI, cron, dynamic fix commands, dependency-injected extension point for custom checkers.

suggest.angeo/module-rich-data: Product, Organization, FAQ JSON-LD and merchant policies
suggest.angeo/module-openai-product-feed: ACP product feed for ChatGPT Shopping
suggest.angeo/module-openai-product-feed-api: REST API endpoints for ACP feed
suggest.angeo/module-ucp: Universal Commerce Protocol profile (/.well-known/ucp) for Google AI Mode / Gemini
suggest.angeo/module-aeo-brand-visibility: Live AI visibility check across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini
